clean_headline: Mr. Sanjeev Kumar, has tendered his resignation as Independent Director of the Company.
raw_headline: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, this is to inform that Mr. Sanjeev Kumar, has tendered his resignation as Independent Director of the Company.
